parts: Brazil’s largest city, Sao Paulo, was planned by this Swiss-born architect whose other South American designs include the Curutchet House. He is better known for houses like the Villa Savoye and the book Toward an Architecture.

62d98018f67c8a6f6e0a8a3f.question: A squire of this character named Gurth manages to escape from his former master and joins the jester Wamba in the forest. This title character’s only childhood friend Lunero was the servant of the character’s uncle; after accidentally shooting that uncle, this character fled to (*) Veracruz.
